title: EVALUATE-DECIDE output — scored decision per DP* with rationale and consequences

id.description: DP id carried verbatim from option file; never re-minted

decision.description: Decision text carried verbatim from option file; never re-authored

category.description: Category carried verbatim from option file; never re-categorized

forced_by.description: Forcing aPRD ids carried verbatim from option file

cut_ref.description: Cut element reference carried verbatim from option file

options_ref.description: Option file this decision was made from (03-options/DP*.json)

grounding_source.description: Carried from option file's grounding.source (existing_system | canon | reasoned)

evaluation.description: One entry per option; len == option_count; proof alternatives were live (D1, D3)

option.description: Option name verbatim from option file

assessment.description: Neutral assessment of how this option fares against forces; written as property of option, before any pick; cites real ids

decisive_factors.description: aPRD/cut ids most driving this option's standing

decision_made.description: Chosen option's option string verbatim; must match one evaluation entry

rationale.description: Why this option's trade-off profile best satisfies contract; names forces that tip it + weighting

rejected.description: One entry per non-picked option; empty when degenerate_forced

why_rejected.description: Concrete consequence ruling it out, traced to specific force (C*/AC*/A*/INV*/forced_by id)

consequences.description: Forward-looking outcomes; tells Phase 3 what HLD must honor

positive.description: What pick buys, traced to force it satisfies

accepted_cost.description: Downside knowingly taken on — trade-off accepted by this pick

follow_on.description: Decisions this pick enables or constrains; may reference DP id, INV id, or deferred item

traces.description: forced_by ∪ additional aPRD/cut ids cited as decisive; real ids only, no padding

degenerate_forced.description: True only when option file was degenerate: true (single compliant option)

degenerate_reason.description: Carried from option file when degenerate_forced; null otherwise

lane_note.description: Fixed reminder of lane boundaries for downstream roles
